ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cisco-Talos/clamav
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cisco-Talos/clamav
Language: c
ClamAV - Documentation is here: https://docs.clamav.net

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp
Language: c
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FRRouting/frr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FRRouting/frr
Language: c
The FRRouting Protocol Suite

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FalkorDB/FalkorDB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FalkorDB/FalkorDB
Language: c
A super fast Graph Database uses GraphBLAS under the hood for its sparse adjacency matrix graph representation. Our goal is to provide the best Knowledge Graph for LLM (GraphRAG).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HandBrake/HandBrake
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HandBrake/HandBrake
Language: c
HandBrake's development repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: acidanthera/OpenCorePkg
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/acidanthera/OpenCorePkg
Language: c
OpenCore bootloader

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/nuttx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/nuttx
Language: c
Apache NuttX is a mature, real-time embedded operating system (RTOS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cilium/tetragon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cilium/tetragon
Language: c
eBPF-based Security Observability and Runtime Enforcement

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
Language: c
A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firedancer-io/firedancer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firedancer-io/firedancer
Language: c
Firedancer is Jump Crypto's Solana validator software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: freebsd/freebsd-src
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src
Language: c
The FreeBSD src tree publish-only repository. Experimenting with 'simple' pull requests....

ns0:entry.ns0:title: littlefs-project/littlefs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/littlefs-project/littlefs
Language: c
A little fail-safe filesystem designed for microcontrollers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mpv-player/mpv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mpv-player/mpv
Language: c
🎥 Command line media player

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raysan5/raylib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raysan5/raylib
Language: c
A simple and easy-to-use library to enjoy videogames programming

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redcanaryco/atomic-red-team
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team
Language: c
Small and highly portable detection tests based on MITRE's ATT&CK.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: taosdata/TDengine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/taosdata/TDengine
Language: c
High-performance, scalable time-series database designed for Industrial IoT (IIoT) scenarios

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tr4m0ryp/tr4mpass
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tr4m0ryp/tr4mpass
Language: c
Free, open-source iCloud activation lock bypass tool. Remove iCloud lock from iPhone 5s through iPhone 15 Pro (iOS 12-26.1). Fully offline -- no servers, no payments. Supports checkm8 (A5-A11) and session activation (A12+).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tursodatabase/libsql
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tursodatabase/libsql
Language: c
libSQL is a fork of SQLite that is both Open Source, and Open Contributions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: winsiderss/systeminformer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/winsiderss/systeminformer
Language: c
A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @ https://windows-internals.com

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wolfSSL/wolfssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wolfSSL/wolfssl
Language: c
The wolfSSL library is a small, fast, portable implementation of TLS/SSL for embedded devices to the cloud. wolfSSL supports up to TLS 1.3 and DTLS 1.3! Update to wolfSSL 5.9.1 for the latest CVE fixes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
